full_text:
Fei [unknown] (Boren) 費? (伯仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei [unknown] (費?), styledBoren (伯仁), was born in Jiangxia. Invited west by his cousin in 200, looked after Fei Yi. Fei [unknown] was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
